lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: Welcome to the pet insurance bureau. How can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me about pets and pet insurance?

lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: Certainly! You can find pets while out on your adventures. They're very rare, but you may be lucky enough to find one.

lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: You have a chance to find them when defeating bosses, playing minigames, and taking part in skilling activities.

lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: If you do find one, they will be automatically insured against loss, for free!

lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: If you then somehow lose your pet, you can reclaim it here for free also. The service used to cost Reclaim tokens worth 1,000,000 coins each. If you have any of those, I can refund you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see, thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost a pet. Have you got it?

lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: If you've lost your pet, it will be reclaimable here!

lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: Let's have a look...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a pet that I'd like to insure.

lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: You don't need to pay to insure your pet with me. They're automatically insured for free as soon as you find them!

lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: If you lose a pet somehow, you can come here and reclaim them. It used to cost reclaim tokens, although we're now subsidised by the Grand Exchange and the service is free. If you have any reclaim tokens left, let

lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: us know and we will buy them back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What pets have I insured?

lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: Every pet you've ever found is automatically insured here!

lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: Here, take a look...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My pet is still lost. Could you look again?

lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: It's possible there was an error in our records. Let me check again for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: You don't need to pay to insure your pet with me. They're automatically insured for free as soon as you find them!

lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: If you keep waving money at me, I might take it!

lines.speaker: Probita
lines.text: This is a pet insurance bureau. I'm not insuring that.
